title: AetherPack x32 For Hypixel Skyblock
description:
AetherPack is the largest x32 texture pack for Hypixel Skyblock.

This pack has made with texture of other packs, skelarex aetherien and this community.
body:
# AetherPack is currently mooving to 1.21.10+

This transition take a lot of time, dont expect pack release before this summer.

The 1.21.10 version is a massive revamp of some aspect of the pack, it will not be called "v3"

Support the pack development and transition by subscribing to Skelarex Aetherien Youtube and Twitch.

# AetherPack is the largest x32 Hypixel Skyblock texture pack

Ty all for 20k Downloads, enjoy the V2 of the Pack !

**This Pack requires Optifine : options -> video settings -> other -> custom item ON**

This pack was made with textures from other packs, skelarex aetherien, 
and with the help of the community.

So far, I have spent 350 hours making this texture pack, as I need to find/create all the textures and make the animations work. If you wish to support this project, you can donate via my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/user/membership?u=94838233) !

Every Beta/Alpha versions are only available to contributors.

# AetherPack Dark Overlay

A brand new pack has been released, a pack that improve mining experience skyblock and provide more darker texture to all blocks, discover this new overlay pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aetherpack-dark-overlay-x32).

# pack used to make this pack :

- [Imperial's hypixel skyblock pack x32 v13, x16 v14](https://hypixel.net/threads/hypixel-skyblock-pack-the-mining-update.2103515/)
- [xcynil's skyblock pack x32](https://hypixel.net/threads/xcynis-skyblock-pack-v2-2-mashup-revamped-swords-and-accessories.3379991/)
- [faithfull x32](https://faithfulpack.net/)
- [Mint mathox pack](http://www.mediafire.com/file/rtxl8ll8fzon8sb/%2521__%25C2%25A72Mint_x_MathoX_Mashup_Pack.zip/file)
- [icy mathox pack](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m5EVE6zTV8w&t=39s)
- [furfsky reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn)
- [hypixel+ pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hypixel-plus)
- [bewitched x32 pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bewitched-x32)
- [skyblock overhaul](https://hypixel.net/threads/new-skyblock-overhaul-32x-release-v-1.4185988)
- [dwarven mines overlay v3 pack](https://hypixel.net/threads/dwarven-mines-overlay-texture-pack-many-new-items.3789006/)

# texture pack contributors :

- skelarex aetherien (nearly 96% of AetherPack unique textures)
- robinss (enderman slayer katanas)
- luno47 (some weapons and items)
- romaincha24 & t_letter (help with english translations (posts, Pack Info and modrinth page)
